title: Protobufライブラリの重大な脆弱性がJavaScriptコード実行を可能にする
title_en: Critical flaw in Protobuf library enables JavaScript code execution
summary: Googleの Protocol Buffers の広く使用されているJavaScript実装である protobuf.js の重大なリモートコード実行脆弱性に対する概念実証エクスプロイトコードが公開されました。 [...]
summary_en: Proof-of-concept exploit code has been published for a critical remote code execution flaw in protobuf.js, a widely used JavaScript implementation of Google's Protocol Buffers. [...]

title: Microsoft Edge更新バグによってMicrosoft Teamsの右クリックペースト機能が破損
title_en: Microsoft Teams right-click paste broken by Edge update bug
summary: Microsoftは、最近のMicrosoft Edgeブラウザ更新によって導入されたバグが、Microsoft Teamsデスクトップクライアントのチャットで右クリックペースト機能を破損させていることを警告しています。 [...]
summary_en: Microsoft is warning that a recent Microsoft Edge browser update introduced a bug that breaks right-click paste in chats in the Microsoft Teams desktop client. [...]

title: NAKIVO v11.2: ランサムウェア対策、高速レプリケーション、vSphere 9およびProxmox VE 9.0対応

summary_en: NAKIVO Inc. announced the general availability of NAKIVO Backup & Replication v11.2, focused on fast, reliable, and proactive data protection. [...]

title: AppleがiPhoneパスコードバグの修正に取り組む。チェコ語キーボード文字欠落に関連
title_en: Apple Works on Fix for iPhone Passcode Bug Linked to Missing Czech Keyboard Character

summary_en: Apple is reportedly developing a software fix for a frustrating iOS 26 bug that has left some users entirely locked out of their iPhones for months. title: 研究者がClaude Opusを使用して動作するChromeエクスプロイトチェーンを構築

summary: AnthropicのMythosおよびProject Glasswingモデルの最近の発表をめぐる激しい議論の最中、セキュリティ研究者はフロンティアAIの現実的なサイバーセキュリティへの影響を実証した。理論的な警告を超えて、研究者はClaude Opusを正常に利用して
summary_en: Amidst the heated debate surrounding Anthropic’s recent announcement of its Mythos and Project Glasswing models, a security researcher has demonstrated the tangible cybersecurity implications of frontier AI. Moving beyond theoretical warnings, the researcher successfully utilized Claude Opus to cons

title: Fiverr、ユーザー情報がGoogle インデックスにリークされている可能性、研究者が指摘
title_en: Fiverr Allegedly Leaks User Information to Google Indexing, Researchers Say
summary: フリーランスサービスプラットフォームのFiverrは、研究者によって機密顧客ファイルが公開されておりGoogle検索によってインデックスされていることが発見された後、重大なプライバシーインシデントに直面している。Hacker Newsでの最近の報告によると、セキュアでないファイルホスティング設定により、個人識別情報が公開されてしまった
summary_en: Freelance service platform Fiverr is facing a significant privacy incident after researchers discovered that sensitive customer files are publicly accessible and indexed by Google search. According to a recent disclosure on Hacker News, an insecure file-hosting configuration has exposed personal ide

title: Nexcorium関連のMiraiバリアントがTBK DVRエクスプロイトを使用してボットネット操作を拡大
title_en: Nexcorium-Associated Mirai Variant Uses TBK DVR Exploit to Scale Botnet Operations

summary_en: A new iteration of the notorious Mirai botnet, dubbed Nexcorium, has emerged in the wild, aggressively targeting internet-connected video recording devices. According to recent threat research published by Fortinet’s FortiGuard Labs, threat actors are exploiting a known command injection vulne

title: 2026年も約600万台のインターネット公開FTPサーバーが脆弱性にさらされている、Censysが警告
title_en: Nearly 6 Million Internet-Facing FTP Servers Still Exposed in 2026, Censys Warns

summary_en: According to a recent April 2026 report by security researcher Himaja Motheram at Censys, just under 6 million internet-facing hosts are still running the File Transfer Protocol (FTP). While this marks a significant 40% decline from the 10.1 million servers observed in 2024, the presence of this dec

title: FortiSandbox脆弱性のPoC エクスプロイトが公開、攻撃者がコマンド実行可能に
title_en: PoC Exploit Released for FortiSandbox Vulnerability that Allows Attacker to Execute Commands

summary_en: A proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit has been publicly released for a critical vulnerability in Fortinet’s FortiSandbox product, tracked as CVE-2026-39808. The flaw allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary operating system commands as root, the highest privilege level, without

title: Payouts King ランサムウェアがQEMU VMを使用してエンドポイントセキュリティをバイパス
title_en: Payouts King ransomware uses QEMU VMs to bypass endpoint security
summary: Payouts King ランサムウェアは、QEMU エミュレータをリバースSSHバックドアとして使用し、侵害されたシステム上で隠されたVMを実行し、エンドポイントセキュリティをバイパスしています。[...]
summary_en: The Payouts King ransomware is using the QEMU emulator as a reverse SSH backdoor to run hidden virtual machines on compromised systems and bypass endpoint security. [...]

title: ハッカーがCVE-2023-33538の悪用によりTP-Linkルーターを標的にしてMiraiマルウェアを拡散
title_en: Hackers Target TP-Link Routers With Mirai Malware in CVE-2023-33538 Exploitation Attempts

summary_en: A known security flaw in several end-of-life TP-Link Wi-Fi routers is being actively targeted by hackers trying to install Mirai-based botnet malware on vulnerable devices. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2023-33538, affects multiple TP-Link models that no longer receive vendor updates, leaving us

title: メール経由ワーム急増が産業用制御システム全体に新たな脅威波をもたらす

summary_en: A global wave of email-borne worms hit industrial control systems (ICS) in the fourth quarter of 2025, marking one of the most concerning threat shifts seen across operational technology (OT) environments in recent years. The surge was largely tied to a single piece of malware that silently spread t

title: 偽のZoom SDKアップデートが新しいmacOS侵入チェーンでSapphire Sleetマルウェアを配布

summary_en: A North Korean threat actor known as Sapphire Sleet has launched a new campaign against macOS users, using a fake Zoom SDK update to trick victims into running malicious files that steal passwords, cryptocurrency assets, and personal data. Unlike attacks that exploit software flaws, this campaign re

title: Grinex取引所、$13.7Mの暗号資産ハックを「西側情報機関」のせいにする

title: 攻撃者がCVE-2026-39987を悪用してHugging Face経由でブロックチェーンベースのバックドアを拡散

summary_en: A critical vulnerability in the marimo Python notebook platform is now being actively used by attackers to deploy a blockchain-powered backdoor on developer systems. The flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-39987, allows remote code execution without authentication, making it a dangerous entry point for threat

title: 中国のマーケットプレイスで販売されている偽造Ledgerハードウェアウォレットが暗号資産のシードとPINを盗む
title_en: Fake Ledger Hardware Wallets on Chinese Marketplaces Steal Crypto Seeds and PINs

summary_en: A Brazilian cybersecurity researcher has exposed a sophisticated, large-scale supply chain scam involving counterfeit Ledger Nano S Plus hardware wallets sold through a Chinese marketplace, devices engineered from the ground up to silently drain cryptocurrency across roughly 20 blockchains. The find

title: 地下ガイドの内部:脅威アクターが盗まれたクレジットカードショップを検証する方法

summary_en: In cybercrime markets, trust isn't assumed, it's verified. Flare reveals how underground guides teach actors to evaluate carding shops based on data quality, reputation, and survivability. [...]

title: Anthropicが自動化されたリアルタイムサイバーセキュリティ保護機能を備えたClaude Opus 4.7をリリース

summary_en: Anthropic has launched Claude Opus 4.7, its latest flagship model, combining improved coding and vision capabilities with automated real-time safeguards to detect and block high-risk cybersecurity requests. The release is notable because Anthropic is testing these protections on a broadly available

title: ハッカーがATHRを使用してAI駆動のビッシング、認証情報盗難、電話ベースのフィッシングを大規模に実行
title_en: Hackers Use ATHR to Run AI-Powered Vishing, Credential Theft, and Phone-Based Phishing at Scale

summary_en: A new cybercrime platform called ATHR is making it much easier for attackers to run large-scale phone-based phishing operations, also known as vishing. Instead of relying on malicious links or infected email attachments, this platform sends simple-looking emails with just a phone number. When the ta

title: ウェビナー：フィッシングから影響まで — MSPがセキュリティと復旧の両方を再考すべき理由
title_en: Webinar: From phishing to fallout — Why MSPs must rethink both security and recovery
summary: サイバー攻撃は多くのMSPおよび企業防御が対応できるよりも速く進化しており、フィッシングが現在のサイバー犯罪の大部分を駆動しています。セキュリティと復旧戦略を組み合わせてリスクを軽減し、ビジネス継続性を維持する方法を学ぶために、今後のウェビナーにご参加ください。[...]
summary_en: Cyberattacks are evolving faster than many MSP and corporate defenses can keep up, with phishing driving much of today's cybercrime. Join our upcoming webinar to learn how to combine security and recovery strategies to reduce risk and maintain business continuity. [...]

title: Payouts Kingが新しいランサムウェア脅威として台頭 - 元BlackBasta関係者との関連が浮上

summary_en: A relatively unknown ransomware group called Payouts King has emerged as a serious cybersecurity threat, carrying the torch of the now-defunct BlackBasta operation. Since its appearance in April 2025, the group has quietly carried out targeted attacks while remaining largely under the radar, combini

title: CISA、攻撃で悪用されているApache ActiveMQの入力検証脆弱性に警告を発出
title_en: CISA Warns of Apache ActiveMQ Input Validation Vulnerability Exploited in Attacks

summary_en: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has issued an urgent warning regarding a critical security defect in Apache ActiveMQ. On April 16, 2026, the agency officially added the vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-34197, to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog. Federal

title: 漏洩したWindows Defender 0-Day脆弱性が攻撃で積極的に悪用されている

summary_en: An active in-the-wild exploitation of three recently leaked Windows Defender privilege escalation vulnerabilities, with threat actors deploying proof-of-concept exploit code sourced directly from public GitHub repositories against real enterprise targets. title: CISAがApache ActiveMQの脆弱性が積極的に悪用されていることを警告

summary_en: CISA warned that attackers are now exploiting a high-severity Apache ActiveMQ vulnerability, which was patched earlier this month after going undetected for 13 years. [...]

title: Windows Snipping Toolの脆弱性により、攻撃者がネットワーク上でスプーフィング攻撃を実行可能に
title_en: Windows Snipping Tool Vulnerability Allows Attacker to Perform Spoofing Over a Network

title: Azure Windows Admin Centerのワンクリックで実現するRCEにより、攻撃者が任意のコマンドを実行可能に

summary_en: Windows Admin Center is a locally deployed, browser-based management tool used by IT administrators to manage Windows servers, clients, and clusters from a centralized graphical interface. This newly discovered critical flaw, identified by Cymulate Research Labs, allows attackers to achieve unauthen

title: Microsoft: 一部のWindowsサーバーが4月のパッチ適用後に再起動ループに陥る

title: 新しいChromeプライバシー分析がフィンガープリンティングとヘッダーリークによるユーザー露出の方法を示す
